turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE ROBERTS
turns.text: In Case 23-726, Moyle versus United States and 23-727, Idaho versus United States, the Court is issuing a per curiam ruling which I will announce. The writs of certiorari before judgment are dismissed as improvidently granted and the stays entered by the Court on January 5, 2024 are vacated. Justice Kagan filed a concurrence, which Justice Sotomayor joined in full and Justice Jackson joined as to Part 2. Justice Barrett filed a concurrence joined by myself and Justice Kavanaugh. Justice Jackson has written an opinion concurring in part and dissenting in part. Justice Alito has filed a dissent, which Justice Thomas joined in full and Justice Gorsuch joined as to Parts 1 and 2.
